title: Agent Coordination Batch Completion Report v1
description: A completed batch's audit verdict, completion report, and final handoff, persisted at batch completion so the dashboard batch drawer can render the completed-batch audit chip, completion table, and final-report block instead of a degrade note. The dashboard-rendered payload (audit, completion, finalReport) follows the dashboard report contract verbatim, including its camelCase field names such as tokensTotal and state.replay, because that contract must be followed exactly; the record envelope (schema_version, batch_id) and contract metadata keep this repository's snake_case convention. Optional metrics send "—" or null and are never omitted or fabricated. This schema defines state only; capture, persistence, and UI behavior are separate concerns.

x-storage-key.segment_encoding: UTF-8 bytes; leave ASCII alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen literal; percent-encode every other byte with uppercase hexadecimal, so no segment can form a . or .. traversal component. Not wired to the CLI or Worker yet.

workspace.description: Tenant/workspace dimension required by ADR 0004. Self-hosted producers use default. Part of the logical key so two tenants sharing a batch_id do not overwrite each other's report.

em_dash.description: Explicit unknown marker rendered as an em dash by the dashboard.

metadata_pair.description: A labeled value that may carry a link; the dashboard renders v as a link when href is present.

optional_integer_metric.description: A non-negative integer, or null / "—" when unknown. Never omitted, never a fabricated zero.

optional_number_metric.description: A non-negative number, or null / "—" when unknown. Never omitted, never a fabricated zero.

optional_text_metric.description: A summary string (including the em dash "—" when unknown), a structured object, or null. Never omitted.

optional_duration_metric.description: A human duration string (for example "1h23m", or the em dash "—" when unknown), a non-negative number of seconds, or null. Never omitted; a numeric duration cannot be negative.

author.description: Free-form author that folds the version and timestamp, for example "justin808 · v1 durable · 2026-07-20T16:24:07Z". There is deliberately no separate version field.

state.description: State references. live is required; replay is optional and sends null / "—" when unknown, never omitted.

baseline.description: Baseline block. path is a short display path; href renders it as a link.

outcome.description: A per-lane outcome row. PR/issue references are plain text unless a links array is supplied, which the dashboard renders as chips. The optional route/pr/sha/issue producer fields match the dashboard's proposed outcome shape; the row stays strict so a typo'd key is rejected rather than silently dropped.

completion.description: The completion report. state, receipts, baseline, and outcomes are structural; usage, tokensTotal, cost, and duration are optional metrics that send null / "—" when unknown but are never omitted.

receipts.description: At least one durable v1 receipt; there is no minimum beyond one.

batch_completion.description: Archive-ready requires state.live, audit, and receipts. The record additionally carries workspace/batch identity and the canonical final report.

finalReport.description: Canonical handoff text rendered verbatim by the dashboard.
